description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a prominent handguard and a fixed stock at the rear. The receiver area is detailed, with a visible magazine well and a pistol grip beneath. The top of the rifle includes a mounted optical sight, likely a scope, for enhanced aiming accuracy. The muzzle end appears to have a device attached, possibly a suppressor, extending the length of the barrel. The overall construction suggests a modern tactical design, with metallic and polymer components. The coloration is a pale, bluish-gray, giving it a subdued, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a long barrel, fixed stock, scope, and a pale bluish-gray finish. Features a suppressor and detailed receiver with a pistol grip.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, scope, handguard, and suppressor.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the scope, magazine well, and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, clearly displaying the pistol grip, handguard, and the extended suppressor.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the rear of the scope.
